negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_014
prompt: The video opens with a vibrant boardwalk scene under a clear blue sky, suggesting a sunny day at a beachside location. The boardwalk is lined with colorful storefronts, prominently featuring a Ben & Jerry's ice cream shop on the left, recognizable by its white signage with bold black lettering and a cartoon character holding an ice cream cone. Adjacent to it is another ice cream stand with bright blue and white decor, showcasing images of ice cream cones and other frozen treats. Further along, various other shops and stalls with red canopies add to the lively atmosphere. Several people are seen walking and standing, some interacting with vendors or browsing the offerings. The ground is paved with large, light-colored tiles that reflect the sunlight, enhancing the brightness of the day. The scene is bustling with activity, with pedestrians moving through the area, contributing to the lively ambiance of the boardwalk.  As the video progresses, a man in a striped shirt and shorts stands near the Ben & Jerry's ice cream shop, seemingly engaged in conversation with someone off-camera. A woman in a dark dress walks past him, carrying a white bag. Another individual, wearing a backpack, appears to be looking at the ice cream menu displayed outside one of the stands. The scene remains lively with more pedestrians moving through the area, maintaining the bustling atmosphere of the boardwalk. By the final frame, the boardwalk continues to be a hub of activity. The same man in the striped shirt and shorts is still standing near the Ben & Jerry's ice cream shop, continuing his conversation. The woman in the dark dress has moved further down the boardwalk, and the individual with the backpack is now closer to the camera, still looking at the ice cream menu. The overall scene remains vibrant and dynamic, with people engaging in various activities, contributing to the lively and inviting atmosphere of the boardwalk.
